[22/35] CQ40: Which URL can I get it from?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version, the input it processes, and the resulting data export.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides assistance, documentation, or support for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization responsible for the creation and development of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaborator">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization that seeks or engages in collaboration with developers.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaborator</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaboration">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasCollaborationStatus">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The current status of the collaboration (e.g., 'Proposed', 'Active', 'Completed').</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">collaboration status</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaboration"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

</rdf:RDF>

[23/35] CQ45: How long has this software been around?
======================================================================

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isMaintained">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Indicates whether the software tool is currently being maintained.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is maintained</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#boolean"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasVersionNumber">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The version identifier of the tool (e.g., 'v1.2.0').</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">version number</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">download URL</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasHelpUrl">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">help URL</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasDeveloperName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The name of the developer or organization.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">developer name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer"/>

</owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">homepage URL</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>

</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasCollaborationStatus">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">collaboration status</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">release date</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#dateTime"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>

======================================================================
[24/35] CQ46: How actively developed is it?
======================================================================

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version, the input it processes, and the resulting data export.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Activity Level</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

======================================================================
[25/35] CQ54: What is the version of this software?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"

         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>

[26/35] CQ55: What new features are in this version?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

[27/35] CQ57: When was the 1.0 version released?
======================================================================

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>

</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentActivityLevel">

</owl:Class>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Version Feature Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

======================================================================
[28/35] CQ58: Is the software open source development? Is there a community development?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version, the input it processes, and the resulting data export.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides assistance, documentation, or support for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization responsible for the creation and development of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaborator">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization that seeks or engages in collaboration with developers.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaborator</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaboration">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing a collaboration relationship between a collaborator and a developer.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentActivityLevel">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The level of current development activity for a tool (e.g., Highly Active, Maintenance, Stagnant).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Activity Level</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#VersionFeatureUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version to a feature and describes the nature of the feature in that version (e.g., new, improved).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Version Feature Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentModel">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The model of software development used for a tool (e.g., Community-driven, Corporate, Individual).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Model</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to the algorithm it employs.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isPublishedIn">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm to the publication where it was first described.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is published in</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its specific algorithm usage instances.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has usage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#employsAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm usage instance to the underlying algorithm being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">employs algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#providesFeature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to the features it provides.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">provides feature</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its software type (e.g., API, Desktop application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has software type</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#performsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to the task it can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">performs task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#wasCreatedBy">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a dataset to the software tool that generated it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">was created by</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its data-task usage configurations.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has tool usage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsDataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool usage instance to the dataset it can process.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports dataset</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool usage instance to the task it supports for a given dataset.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsInputFormat">

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasAlgorithmName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The official name of the algorithm.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">algorithm name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasModificationDescription">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A description of the modifications made to the algorithm for a specific tool's usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">modification description</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFeatureName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The name of the feature (e.g., 'XML editing').</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">feature name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasTaskName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The name of the task (e.g., 'Ontology Alignment').</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">task name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFormatName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The name of the data format (e.g., 'JSON').</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">format name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format"/>

</owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">file extension</rdfs:label>

  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>

======================================================================
[29/35] CQ59: What license and what is permissiveness?
======================================================================

<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Activity Level</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#VersionFeatureUsage">

</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentModel">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Model</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

======================================================================
[30/35] CQ60: Is it open source or not?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version, the input it processes, and the resulting data export.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides assistance, documentation, or support for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization responsible for the creation and development of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaborator">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization that seeks or engages in collaboration with developers.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaborator</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaboration">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing a collaboration relationship between a collaborator and a developer.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentActivityLevel">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The level of current development activity for a tool (e.g., Highly Active, Maintenance, Stagnant).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Activity Level</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#VersionFeatureUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version to a feature and describes the nature of the feature in that version (e.g., new, improved).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Version Feature Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentModel">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The model of software development used for a tool (e.g., Community-driven, Corporate, Individual).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Model</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is published in</rdfs:label>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its specific algorithm usage instances.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has usage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>

[31/35] CQ65: Is it FOSS?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The type of license under which a software tool is released (e.g., Open Source, Proprietary).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersion">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific released version of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolVersionExport">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version, the input it processes, and the resulting data export.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Version Export</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#HelpResource">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A resource that provides assistance, documentation, or support for a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Help Resource</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Developer">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization responsible for the creation and development of a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Developer</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaborator">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">An individual or organization that seeks or engages in collaboration with developers.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaborator</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Collaboration">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing a collaboration relationship between a collaborator and a developer.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Collaboration</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentActivityLevel">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The level of current development activity for a tool (e.g., Highly Active, Maintenance, Stagnant).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Activity Level</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#VersionFeatureUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a specific tool version to a feature and describes the nature of the feature in that version (e.g., new, improved).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Version Feature Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#DevelopmentModel">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The model of software development used for a tool (e.g., Community-driven, Corporate, Individual).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Development Model</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

  <!-- owl:ObjectProperty declarations -->

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#usesAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to the algorithm it employs.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">uses algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#isPublishedIn">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm to the publication where it was first described.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">is published in</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its specific algorithm usage instances.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has usage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#employsAlgorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates an algorithm usage instance to the underlying algorithm being used.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">employs algorithm</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#providesFeature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to the features it provides.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">provides feature</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasSoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its software type (e.g., API, Desktop application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has software type</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#performsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to the task it can perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">performs task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#wasCreatedBy">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a dataset to the software tool that generated it.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">was created by</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasToolUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool to its data-task usage configurations.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">has tool usage</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsDataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool usage instance to the dataset it can process.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports dataset</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsTask">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">Relates a tool usage instance to the task it supports for a given dataset.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">supports task</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task"/>
</owl:ObjectProperty>

<owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#supportsInputFormat">

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>

</owl:ObjectProperty>

  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool"/>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasAlgorithmName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The official name of the algorithm.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">algorithm name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasModificationDescription">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A description of the modifications made to the algorithm for a specific tool's usage.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">modification description</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasFeatureName">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The name of the feature (e.g., 'XML editing').</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">feature name</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature"/>
  <rdfs:range rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
  <rdf:type rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#FunctionalProperty"/>
</owl:DatatypeProperty>

<owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#hasTaskName">

======================================================================
[32/35] CQ68: Is it free or not?
======================================================================
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<rdf:RDF xml:base="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"
         xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
         xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
         xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
         xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#">

  <owl:Ontology rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#"/>

  <!-- owl:Class declarations -->

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Tool">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software tool or system that implements specific computational methods.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Algorithm">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A named and published computational procedure or formula for solving a problem.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Publication">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A document or venue where an algorithm is formally published.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Publication</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#AlgorithmUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the specific application of an algorithm within a tool, allowing for the description of modifications.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Algorithm Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Feature">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific capability or functionality provided by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Feature</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The category or architectural type of software (e.g., API, Desktop application, Web application).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Software Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#WebService">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A software type that provides services over a network, typically via HTTP.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Web Service</rdfs:label>
  <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource='http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#SoftwareType'/>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Task">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific goal or activity that a software tool is designed to perform.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Task</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Dataset">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A collection of data produced by a software tool.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Dataset</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolDataTaskUsage">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that links a software tool, the dataset it can process, and the task it supports.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Data Task Usage</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#Format">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A specific data format or file specification (e.g., RDF, XML, JSON, CSV).</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ValidInput">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class that defines the requirements for a valid input to a tool, combining format and dataset constraints.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Valid Input</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#FormatCategory">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">The classification of a data format, such as Open or Proprietary.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Format Category</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#ToolCompatibility">
  <rdfs:comment xml:lang="en">A reification class representing the compatibility between two tools, where one tool can process the output of another.</rdfs:comment>
  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">Tool Compatibility</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>

<owl:Class rdf:about="http://www.semanticweb.org/myontology#LicenseType">

  <rdfs:label xml:lang="en">License Type</rdfs:label>
</owl:Class>
